title: Decentralized Task Marketplace
problemStatement: Contributors ghost on commitments with no consequences.
projectDescription: A trustless coordination layer where participants stake tokens to join tasks and are rewarded or slashed based on delivery.
solution: Smart contract-enforced commitment using Imara Protocol on Polkadot Hub EVM.

title: On-chain Reputation System
problemStatement: No portable reputation across Web3 projects.
projectDescription: Build a reputation NFT that reflects completed tasks, verified contributions, and staking history.
solution: Soulbound token minted on successful task completion via Imara Protocol.
